name: Personal Lawsuits for Welding Fume Lung Cancer in Bountiful

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer personally for lung cancer from workplace welding fumes in Bountiful?
mainEntity.text: Can I sue my employer personally for lung cancer from workplace welding fumes in Bountiful?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, Utah workers' comp is exclusive remedy barring gross negligence or intentional misconduct; third-party suits possible against equipment makers for defective respirators causing lung cancer.

suggestedAnswer.text: Bountiful welders limited to comp unless proving intentional harm (rare). Sue suppliers for faulty PPE under product liability. Coordinate with comp carrier to avoid offsets. Evidence: exposure logs, cancer biopsy linking to hexavalent chromium. Settlements often exceed comp limits.
